hero.description: I create attractive and functional digital experiences with a minimalist and user-centered approach.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a passionate web developer with experience in creating modern websites and applications. My goal is to combine attractive design with intuitive functionality to create memorable digital experiences.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: I create attractive and responsive interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript and modern frameworks like React.

backend.title: Backend Development
backend.description: I implement robust solutions using Node.js, Express, and SQL/NoSQL databases.

uxui.title: UX/UI Design
uxui.description: I design intuitive and accessible user experiences with a user-centered approach.

technologies.title: Technologies
technologies.description: Specializing in web development, I build modern and scalable applications using React and Node.js, alongside robust backend solutions with Java. I also design and develop custom projects using PHP and WordPress, and manage both SQL and NoSQL database architectures. Beyond my primary tech stack, I stand out for my quick adaptability: if your project requires specific tools or technologies, I can seamlessly integrate them to provide the most efficient technical solution.

projects.sectionDescription: Here are some of the projects I've worked on. Click on any project to see more details.

project1.title: Auto Vidrios de Oriente (2021)
project1.description: Web solution for automotive glass company, featuring aerial promotional video, services, contact, and online quote.
project1.fullDescription: Corporate website developed in WordPress for a company specializing in the sale, installation, and repair of automotive glass. The portal (created in 2021) presents main services (repair, windshield replacement, waterproofing, tinting), contact information, branch locations, and an online quote form. Additionally, a promotional video with aerial shots taken by drone was produced and is featured in the main section of the site.

project2.title: Jolman Developer
project2.description: Professional personal portfolio, featuring projects, skills, contact, and online payment integration.
project2.fullDescription: Personal portfolio website developed with Vite, React, and TypeScript, deployed on Vercel. Showcases a selection of featured projects, professional background, technical skills, contact form, and online payment integration. Perfect as a reference for anyone seeking a modern, mobile-optimized personal website with advanced features.

project3.title: Induscom
project3.description: Importer of spare parts for trucks and heavy machinery, specialized in Chinese diesel engines, transmissions, and clutches.
project3.fullDescription: Corporate website for Induscom Colombia, a direct importer of spare parts for trucks and heavy machinery. Launched in 2025, the site features a clean layout showcasing their main product lines—Chinese diesel engines, transmissions, clutches, and specialized accessories—with a strong focus on technical advice, shipping within 24 hours, and WhatsApp support. It includes highlighted product sections, a quick quote request form, customer testimonials, and educational resources (blog). The platform builds trust through a clear warranty message and personalized assistance.

project4.title: Fundació Kālida – Spain
project4.description: Development and maintenance of landing pages and the Agenda module for the Fundació Kālida website, including implementation of new features, component optimization, and production incident resolution.
project4.fullDescription: I collaborated on the development and maintenance of the Fundació Kālida website, working in a production environment oriented to high traffic and dynamic content. My tasks included creating and refactoring landing pages (campaigns, informational content, and online sections), ensuring correct semantic markup, solid performance, and consistency with the site’s global design. I also contributed to the evolution of the Agenda module, implementing functional and UI adjustments based on support tickets: bug fixing, minor behavior changes, improvements in the presentation of activities, and alignment with the communication team’s requirements. All of this following good maintainability practices, continuous review of changes, and a strong focus on user experience.

project5.title: Feel Hospitality Advisor – Spain
project5.description: End‑to‑end development of the Feel Hospitality corporate website: architecture, responsive layout, contact form integration, and performance and accessibility optimization (WordPress).
project5.fullDescription: Complete development of the Feel Hospitality corporate website, a consultancy specialized in tourism accessibility. Starting from scratch, I defined the information architecture, implemented the responsive layout, and customized the WordPress theme in line with the brand’s identity. I integrated contact forms with validation and status messages, optimized performance (image loading, HTML structure, and assets), and took care of key accessibility aspects (heading hierarchy, contrast, alternative texts, and focus states in forms), aligned with the inclusive approach of the project. The result is a clear, conversion‑oriented landing experience that is easy to maintain and ready to scale in terms of content and services.

contratacion.title: Hiring
contratacion.summary: Everything you need to know before hiring my services: legal aspects, invoicing, confidentiality, and payment options.

fullContent.intro: As an independent professional in Colombia, I comply with all current legal regulations for providing software development services. I can issue valid invoices for clients in both Colombia and abroad.

programacionDirecta.title: Direct Programming:
programacionDirecta.content: I want to emphasize that I personally develop in all the technologies mentioned in my portfolio. This means that projects are carried out directly by me, guaranteeing a high level of quality and attention to detail. I only resort to subcontracting in very specific cases that require skills or knowledge outside my area of expertise.

quienPuedeContratarme.title: Who can hire me?
quienPuedeContratarme.intro: I am available to work with:
list: Individuals and companies in Colombia and abroad.
Own projects or as part of a development team.
quienPuedeContratarme.additional: I have experience working with version control systems in collaborative environments. I often collaborate with graphic and multimedia design companies that need a programmer to complement their visual projects.

confidencialidad.title: Confidentiality:
confidencialidad.content: To ensure the security of your project, I can sign a non-disclosure agreement (NDA) in which I commit not to disclose sensitive information or specific agreed details.

pagos.title: Payments:
pagos.content: I am open to discussing different payment modalities that suit your needs, as long as the agreed terms are met.

pagosOnline.title: Online Payments:
pagosOnline.content: For the convenience of my clients, especially those abroad, I accept online payments through the secure PayU Latam payment gateway integrated into my website. This facilitates transactions and guarantees payment security.

tarifas.title: Rates
tarifas.summary: Reference prices for various web and app projects. Inquire about your custom project!

fullContent.intro: These are the reference prices for the most common jobs I usually do. However, I am open to any type of project that requires programming. Feel free to ask!

cms.title: Website with CMS (WordPress, etc.): From 200 USD
cms.content: This type of project is based on a template adaptable to specific design or graphic requirements. It includes the installation of standard plugins (SEO, cookie notice, cache, etc.) and additional plugins that the client needs. It also includes data import, multi-language configuration, and any other adjustments needed to achieve the desired result.

tiendaOnline.title: Online store with CMS (WooCommerce): From 400 USD
tiendaOnline.content: Similar to the previous one, but with a higher level of complexity due to the configuration of rates, products, variations, discounts, payment gateways, etc. It can also include integrations with POS/ERP or APIs from various transport agencies.

webAMedida.title: Custom website: From 650 USD
webAMedida.content: This type of development offers total freedom regarding the theme and functionality of the page: portals, online stores, administration panels, etc. The design can be custom or based on a template. If the client has conducted an SEO study, I can apply the conclusions to the development. I usually program in MERN environments, but I can also work with other technologies as needed. The page can be multi-language at no additional cost. I can adapt the page to comply with accessibility standards (WCAG AA, etc.).

appHibrida.title: Hybrid app for iOS and Android: From 950 USD
appHibrida.content: Developed with React Native. This type of development is easy to maintain, adapts to any design, is economical, and compatible with all devices. It includes the API Rest service and the data administration panel.

list.title: Hosting:
list.content: Hosting services are the client's responsibility, who can manage them through platforms like GoDaddy or their preferred one.

list.title: Other developments:
list.content: If you have a project in mind that doesn't fit into the above categories, don't hesitate to ask me! I have worked on diverse projects, including developments with AI, bots, IoT programming, etc.

pagaOnline.title: Make Your Payment
pagaOnline.description: Have we already agreed on your service? Pay easily and securely directly from here using our secure payment gateway.

form.title: Payment Form
form.description: Complete the following information to securely process your payment through PayU Latam.
form.name: Full name
form.amount: Amount to pay in Colombian Pesos (COP), without periods or commas.

messages.redirect: You will be redirected to the payment gateway in a few seconds...
messages.tryAgain: There was a problem processing your request. Please try again.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Do you have a question or want to collaborate on a project? Don't hesitate to contact me.

form.title: Send me a message
form.name: Your name
form.thankYou: Thank you for contacting me. I will respond as soon as possible.
form.acceptPolicies: I accept the data processing policies.
form.acceptPoliciesError: You must accept the data processing policies to send the message.

info.title: Contact information
info.description: I am open to freelance work opportunities, collaborations, or full-time positions. Don't hesitate to contact me through any of the following means.

thanks.title: Thank you for your trust!
thanks.description: We are processing your payment. You will soon receive an email from PayULatam with the status of your transaction.
thanks.appreciation: I greatly appreciate that you have chosen my services to develop your web project. Your vision is important to me, and I am committed to delivering it with the highest quality and professionalism.
thanks.contact: In the meantime, you can contact me if you have any questions about our project.
thanks.excited: I am excited to start working together!

avisoContent: This website complies with Law 1581 of 2012 on Personal Data Protection, Decree 1377 of 2013, Law 1266 of 2008, Law 527 of 1999 on Electronic Commerce and Law 23 of 1982 on Copyrights, as well as other applicable regulations in the Republic of Colombia.

These General Conditions regulate the access and use of Jolman Developer's website, including the contents and services made available on it. Any person accessing the website https://jolmandeveloper.com agrees to be bound by the General Conditions in force at any time.
The user agrees to use the website, its services, and contents in accordance with Colombian legislation, good faith, and public order.

The use of the website for illegal or harmful purposes, or in any way that may cause damage or prevent the normal functioning of the website, is prohibited. Regarding the contents of this website, the following is prohibited:
• Its reproduction, distribution, or modification, totally or partially, unless expressly authorized by Jolman Developer as the legitimate owner.
• Any violation of the rights of the provider or Jolman Developer as the legitimate owner.
• Its use for commercial or advertising purposes without authorization.

The user agrees not to engage in any conduct that could damage the image, interests, and rights of Jolman Developer or third parties, or that could damage, disable, or overload the portal https://jolmandeveloper.com, or that prevents, in any way, the normal use of the web.

In accordance with the provisions of Law 23 of 1982 and other copyright regulations, the reproduction, distribution, and public communication, including its modality of making available, of all or part of the contents of this website for commercial purposes, on any medium and by any technical means, without the authorization of Jolman Developer, are expressly prohibited. The user commits to respecting the Intellectual and Industrial Property rights owned by Jolman Developer.

The user acknowledges and accepts that the entire website, texts, contents (including the structure, selection, arrangement, and presentation thereof), photographs, audiovisual material, and graphics, are protected by trademarks, copyrights, and other legitimate rights, in accordance with international treaties and current Colombian legislation.

In the event that a user or a third party considers that a violation of their legitimate intellectual property rights has occurred due to the introduction of a specific content on the web, they must notify Jolman Developer of this circumstance indicating:

• Personal data of the interested party holding the rights allegedly infringed, or indicate the representation with which they are acting in the event that the claim is presented by a third party other than the interested party.

• Point out the contents protected by intellectual property rights and their location on the web, the accreditation of the intellectual property rights indicated, and an express declaration in which the interested party takes responsibility for the veracity of the information provided in the notification.
Jolman Developer authorizes the establishment of links between other websites and its own, provided that the following conditions are met:
• The link is not established from a website whose contents are contrary to the Law, morality, and public order.
• An image of Jolman Developer or its products is not offered that is distorted, harmful, or incorrect.

• The impression is not created that there is a non-existent commercial relationship or link between Jolman Developer and the owners, managers, or advertisers from which the link is created, when this is not the case.

• The impression is not created that the contents or website of Jolman Developer belong to or have been designed by the owners, managers, or advertisers of the website from which the link is established.
Jolman Developer grants no guarantee and is not responsible, in any case, for damages of any kind that could be caused by:
• The lack of availability, maintenance, and effective functioning of the web, or its services and contents.
• The existence of malware, malicious or harmful programs in the contents.
• The illegal, negligent, fraudulent use or contrary to this Legal Notice.
• The lack of legality, quality, reliability, usefulness, and availability of the services provided by third parties and made available to users on the website.
The provider is not responsible under any circumstances for the damages that may result from the illegal or improper use of this webpage.

Generally, the relations between Jolman Developer and the users of its telematics services present on this website are subject to the legislation and jurisdiction of the Republic of Colombia and its ordinary courts.
If any user has any doubt concerning these Legal Conditions or any comment on the portal https://jolmandeveloper.com, please contact info@jolmandeveloper.com.
privacidadContent: Jolman Developer, as responsible for this website, undertakes the commitment to process user and client information with full guarantees and comply with the national and international requirements regulating the collection and use of personal data, specifically Law 1581 of 2012 and Decree 1377 of 2013 of the Republic of Colombia, as well as, where possible, the principles of Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) of the European Parliament.

The personal data communicated by the user to Jolman Developer may be stored in automated databases whose ownership belongs exclusively to Jolman Developer, assuming all technical, organizational, and security measures guaranteeing the confidentiality, integrity, and quality of the information contained therein, in accordance with current data protection regulations. Communication between users and the website uses a secure channel, and the transmitted data is encrypted thanks to HTTPS protocols, thus guaranteeing the best security conditions for user confidentiality.
Commitments of Jolman Developer:
• Not to request personal information unless it is completely necessary to provide a specific service.
• Never to share personal user information with anyone except to comply with the law or if expressly authorized.
• Never to use personal data for a purpose other than that expressed in this Privacy Policy.

This Privacy Policy may vary depending on legislative or self-regulatory requirements. It will apply if users choose to fill out any contact form or online payment form where personal data is collected.
Data Collection
This website collects user data in the following ways:
• Contact form: For inquiries, requests, or direct communication.
• Online payment form: For payment management processing via the PayU gateway.
Principles applied to personal data processing
• Lawfulness, loyalty, and transparency: We will always request the user's consent for the processing of their personal data, clearly indicating the intent.
• Data minimization: We will only request the data strictly necessary.
• Limitation of the storage period: The data will be kept for no longer than necessary for the purposes of the processing.
• Integrity and confidentiality: Your data will be processed in a way that guarantees adequate security to confidential personal data.

Jolman Developer agrees to cancel personal data when they are no longer necessary or relevant for the purpose for which they were collected, and to attend to requests for information, update, or deletion of data made by the user, with Jolman Developer being responsible for processing.
User Rights

Users may exercise their rights of access, correction, deletion, revocation, or claim for infringement of their data via a written request sent to info@jolmandeveloper.com, indicating 'Data Protection' in the subject line.
Use of cookies

Users are informed of the use of cookies to gather information and perform statistical analysis on the use of the website. The cookies used by Jolman Developer are anonymous and do not refer strictly to the user's personal data or allow access to data from the user's hard drive. The user's identity is never directly linked in the cookie, so they cannot be personally identified.
Limitation of Liability

Jolman Developer declines all responsibility in the event of access and website navigation being impossible or hindered due to an interruption, malfunctioning electricity telecommunications network, external servers outside of Jolman Developer's control, or in case of force majeure, cyber-sabotage, social conflicts, or court/administrative injunctions.
Any liability is equally declined for damages the visitor might sustain in their IT systems deriving from the aforementioned occurrences.

Jolman Developer does not guarantee the availability and continuous web portal service, nor assumes any responsibility for damages potentially occurring in the future from tech malfunctions related to reading the information here included.
Within the limits established by the Law, Jolman Developer assumes no responsibility arising from incomplete or outdated data or information found in its Internet pages.
